Bash(python3 -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/ci.yml'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('jobs:', list\(d['jobs'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('on:', d['on'] if 'on' in d else d.get\(True\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('.github/workflows/ci.yml','utf8'\);console.log\('python missing; basic checks:'\);console.log\('has test job:', s.includes\('test:'\)\);console.log\('has services postgres:', s.includes\('postgres:16'\)\);console.log\('integration step sets only TEST_DATABASE_URL:', s.includes\('TEST_DATABASE_URL: postgresql'\)\);")

Bash(cd c:/Users/raksh/dev/forza-team && echo "=== COACH_ROLE_TYPES ===" && grep -nE "COACH_ROLE_TYPES|HEAD_COACH|ASSISTANT|TEAM_MANAGER" src/modules/clubs/schemas.ts | head && echo "=== createTeam ===" && sed -n '/export async function createTeam/,/^}/p' src/modules/clubs/service.ts | head -40 && echo "=== createInvitation \(identity\) ===" && grep -rn "export async function createInvitation\\|function createInvitationInTx" src/modules/identity/ | head && sed -n '/async function createInvitationInTx/,/^}/p' src/modules/identity/*.ts 2>/dev/null | head -50)
